items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to decide whether the output is a finished cafe_lunch_specials_image, not a worksheet, database dump, raw table, or generic mockup.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the artifact reads as a polished cafe display. Partial credit for a styled but weak display. No credit for raw data, notes, or a non-image answer. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to determine whether the image filters the SQLite menu, ranks eligible items, and features only the final selected lunch specials.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the final item set is clear. Partial credit when selection is ambiguous. No credit when the database table is copied without selection. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that exactly these lunch specials are featured: Herbed Lentil Wrap, Citrus Grain Bowl, and Miso Veggie Broth. Item IDs are optional and should not be required.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for exactly the correct item set. Partial credit only for minor readability ambiguity. No credit if any item is replaced or an extra menu item is featured.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify the visible order is Herbed Lentil Wrap first, Citrus Grain Bowl second, and Miso Veggie Broth third. Accept numbered cards, left-to-right, top-to-bottom, or another clear ranking cue.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when ranking is clear and correct. Partial credit when the set is correct but rank is partly ambiguous. No credit when order is wrong or absent.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify each featured item displays the correct item name, price, and prep label: Herbed Lentil Wrap $9.50 8 min; Citrus Grain Bowl $11.00 9 min; Miso Veggie Broth $7.75 6 min. Accept equivalent currency and minute wording.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when all names, prices, and prep values are correctly paired. Partial credit for one minor formatting/readability issue. No credit for wrong values or values attached to wrong items.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that the image clearly communicates the required nut-free quick lunch specials theme. Accept equivalent wording such as nut-free quick lunch specials, quick nut-free lunch picks, fast nut-free lunch specials, or similar phrasing.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the nut-free quick lunch theme is explicit and readable. Partial credit when the theme is implied but weak. No credit when the theme is absent or contradicts the selected items.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that unselected menu items are not promoted as lunch specials, including unavailable, stock-threshold, wrong-meal, nut-containing, slow-prep, draft, test, archived, internal, wrong-window, and below-top-N items.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when no unselected item is featured. Partial credit for a faint ambiguous mention. No credit when any unselected menu item is clearly promoted.

items.check: Accept different cafe display layouts, including menu cards, ranked specials, banner sections, price tags, or prep-time badges, as long as selected items and values are easy to scan.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for clear hierarchy and scanability. Partial credit for cluttered but understandable layout. No credit when selected items are buried. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Do not require item IDs, SQL text, stock counts, margin scores, service windows, or filtering process steps. Treat them only as supporting context if present and correct.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the display focuses on selected specials. Partial credit if extra metadata appears but does not dominate. No credit if process details overwhelm the display. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation for readable typography, clear hierarchy, sufficient contrast, polished cafe styling, and non-crowded spacing.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for readable polished design. Partial credit for minor clutter or weak styling. No credit for unreadable or visually incoherent output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

items.check: The display should have balanced density, clear item/value pairing, platform-safe margins, and no placeholder-like empty regions.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for balanced density and clear sections. Partial credit for weak spacing. No credit for blank, placeholder-like, or low-resolution output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

score_caps.reason: A non-selected menu item appears without a clear exclusion/not-selected context, indicating it may be featured as a lunch special.

allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a lunch special|not promoted|unavailable|ineligible)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Sesame Noodle Cup|Tomato Basil Soup|Sunrise Oat Pot|Roasted Veg Plate|Coconut Curry Bowl|Archived Pita Stack|Test Falafel Box|Chickpea Salad Cup|Nutty Power Salad|Evening Rice Bowl|Old Menu Quinoa Cup|Draft Mezze Plate|Fast Bean Tacos|Sold Out Veg Pocket|Internal Staff Bowl)\b

\b(Sesame Noodle Cup|Tomato Basil Soup|Sunrise Oat Pot|Roasted Veg Plate|Coconut Curry Bowl|Archived Pita Stack|Test Falafel Box|Chickpea Salad Cup|Nutty Power Salad|Evening Rice Bowl|Old Menu Quinoa Cup|Draft Mezze Plate|Fast Bean Tacos|Sold Out Veg Pocket|Internal Staff Bowl)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a lunch special|not promoted|unavailable|ineligible)\b

score_caps.reason: One or more required selected lunch specials is missing.
The output appears to show the unfiltered menu inventory without a clear exclusion/not-selected context.
The final artifact is a raw table, SQL result, or database dump instead of a polished cafe display image.
